response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished software engineer with strong general credentials and recent AI infrastructure work, but fundamentally mismatched for this hardware-focused role. The position requires SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and deep neural network optimization expertise—core domain requirements completely absent from his primarily software-centric career in web, mobile, and application development.
strengths: Current AI infrastructure and agent framework development shows recent engagement with AI systems
Proven ability to optimize for performance at scale with low-latency systems, async I/O, and real-time data handling
15+ years of technical experience across multiple domains demonstrates maturity and breadth
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience—a fundamental core skill for this role
No GPU architecture, accelerator design, or hardware optimization background
Career is primarily web and application software, not hardware systems or accelerator workload optimization
